# Noble Collectors — Full AI Crawler Guidance
> Private access and evidence-backed intelligence for exceptional collector assets.

## Platform Identity
Noble Collectors is a modular, multilingual (EN/AR), PWA-first luxury collector asset platform for serious collectors, estate owners, family offices, advisors, institutions, and designers.

## Core Modules
1. Public Discovery — Curated artifact browsing with public DTOs
2. Collector Asset Taxonomy — 8 category families with risk tiers
3. Built-in CMS — Governed content with workflow states
4. Media Vault — Private originals + EXIF-stripped public variants
5. Trust Spine — Deterministic Evidence Readiness Score (0-100)
6. Heritage Passport — Curatorial dossier with provenance timeline
7. Collectors' Salon — Private access-controlled rooms
8. Noble Library — Heritage Atlas, Museum Index, Maison Heritage, Guides, Glossary
9. Legal & Trust Center — Versioned legal policies with acceptance tracking
10. Noble Introductions Circle — Trusted referral network

## Public Routes
- /explore — Browse categories and artifacts
- /explore/[category] — Category-specific listing
- /artifacts/[slug] — Artifact detail with cost clarity and viewing availability
- /luxury-collectibles — Luxury category hub
- /library — Heritage Atlas, Museums, Maison Heritage, Guides, Glossary
- /legal-trust — Policy pages (privacy, terms, data protection)
- /auctions — Auction preview calendar
- /collectors-salon — Salon information
- /heritage-passport — Passport documentation
- /journal — Editorial content

## Data Boundaries
- All public output uses Zod-validated DTOs (whitelist only)
- No raw database rows, no storage paths, no private evidence
- No passport version or genome data in public
- No reserve prices or bidder identity
- RLS policies enforce 5 security zones (0-5)

## Forbidden Claims
- No AI authenticity or valuation claims
- No certification guarantees
- No fake auction/payment/KYC/shipping authority
- No alcohol/wine/spirits content
